title: oziroe sessilis
side_effects: Oziroe sessilis can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and digestive issues. Consuming large amounts of the plant may lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In extreme cases, improper use of oziroe sessilis can cause liver damage, seizures, and even coma. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
